name: run_scrublet_doublets
description: Detect technical doublets in a single-cell RNA-seq count matrix with Scrublet (Wolock et al., Cell Systems 2019). Simulates synthetic doublets from observed transcriptomes and scores each real cell by its local density of simulated doublets, returning a per-cell doublet_score and a boolean predicted_doublet call — so doublets can be filtered before clustering/annotation. Input is a server-accessible .h5ad of RAW counts (not normalized/log data).

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path or URL to an .h5ad AnnData of RAW counts.

expected_doublet_rate.description: Expected fraction of transcriptomes that are doublets (default 0.06; scale ~0.008 per 1000 cells loaded for 10x).

cell_ids.description: Cell barcodes, aligned with the score/prediction arrays.

doublet_score.description: Per-cell Scrublet doublet score (higher = more doublet-like).

predicted_doublet.description: Per-cell boolean: True if predicted to be a doublet.

n_doublets.description: Number of cells predicted to be doublets.

doublet_rate.description: Fraction of cells predicted to be doublets.

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
